events.title: 3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
events.description: Transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp guided by certified facilitator Moksha
events.full_text:
3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
11th 4pm - 14th 4pm
Tiruvannamali

Experience a transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp, starting on 9th Oct. Guided by certified facilitator Moksha, this retreat offers a deeply meditative experience.
